results.title: England vs New Zealand: Second Test Match Preview and Live Streaming Details
results.description: The second Test match between England and New Zealand is set to take place at The Oval from June 17 to 21. With Joe Root stepping in as captain, England faces challenges with key players missing. New Zealand, under Tom Latham, aims to bounce back after losing the first Test. This article covers team line-ups, live streaming details, and match timings, providing cricket fans with essential information ahead of the exciting clash.

results.title: Austria start their FIFA World Cup campaign with 3-1 win over Jordan
results.description: San Francisco : Austria began their 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign with a 3-1 win over debutants Jordan in San Francisco on Tuesday (local time).Making their first World Cup appearance since 1998, Austria took the lead in the first half through a brilliant long-range goal from Romano Schmid in the 21st minute. results.title: Monsoon Activity Intensifies in Odisha: Fishermen Advised to Avoid Sea till June 21
results.description: Southwest monsoon remained active in Odisha with heavy rain, thunderstorms, and lightning reported in several coastal and adjoining districts. The Regional Meteorological Centre confirmed that the monsoon will cover the entire state within three days. Rainfall activity is expected to increase from June 21 as strong winds from the Arabian Sea strengthen the system.
